mapper.select: SELECT r.* FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_account_role ar ON ar.role_id = r.id AND ar.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ar.account_id = #{accountId} AND r.status = 1 AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY r.role_type ASC, r.id ASC

SELECT CONCAT(rb.module_code, ':', rb.button_code) AS authority FROM sys_role_button rb INNER JOIN sys_account_role ar ON ar.role_id = rb.role_id AND ar.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = rb.role_id AND r.is_deleted = 0 WHERE ar.account_id = #{accountId} AND rb.status = 1 AND rb.is_deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 GROUP BY rb.module_code, rb.button_code ORDER BY rb.module_code ASC, rb.button_code ASC
